author: davion-knight
title: Map-then-audit LLM miner
notes: Self-contained stdlib agent. One LLM map call selects the highest-risk targets from a whole-repo map, then two deep-audit calls analyze them in full source context, within the 3-call / 24k-output-token / 150k-input-token per-problem budget. General-purpose LLM analysis only (no hardcoded project fingerprints or canned findings). Emits matcher-shaped high/critical findings; degrades gracefully on 429/errors.
